data: [{"_id":"6991be005295e60123fe9f6f","name":"Padmanabhaswamy Temple","description":"The Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu. It is considered the richest temple in the world and is a masterpiece of Dravidian and Kerala architectural styles.","category":"Pilgrimage","district":"Thiruvananthapuram","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1629217861916-246eb7678177?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"place","score":1},{"_id":"6991be005295e60123fe9f70","name":"Varkala Cliff","description":"Varkala is the only place in southern Kerala where cliffs are found adjacent to the Arabian Sea. The beach is famous for its natural springs which are believed to have medicinal properties.","category":"Beach","district":"Thiruvananthapuram","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1590050811270-e322662c919d?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"place","score":1},{"_id":"6991be005295e60123fe9f75","name":"Palaruvi Waterfalls","description":"One of the highest waterfalls in Kerala, known as 'Stream of Milk'. It cascades down from a height of 300 feet.","category":"Nature","district":"Kollam","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1432405972618-c60b0225b8f9?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"place","score":1},{"_id":"6991be005295e60123fe9f79","name":"Kuttanad","description":"Kuttanad, the 'Rice Bowl of Kerala', is unique for farming below sea level. It offers scenic views of endless paddy fields and waterways.","category":"Nature","district":"Alappuzha","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593693396818-32544710cc9c?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"place","score":1},{"_id":"6991be005295e60123fe9f81","name":"Wonderla Kochi","description":"The largest water theme park in Kerala, offering a wide variety of exhilarating water and land rides.","category":"Adventure","district":"Ernakulam","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513883049090-d0b7439799bf?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"place","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c86","name":"Coconut Lagoon","description":"Accessible only by boat, this heritage resort celebrates the architectural traditions of old Kerala.","category":"resort","district":"Kottayam","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1520250497591-112f2f40a3f4?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"stay","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c87","name":"Beach Safari Homestay","description":"A friendly, family-run home right on Marari beach. Experience local life and home-cooked Kerala food.","category":"homestay","district":"Alappuzha","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499793983690-31649f80164e?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"stay","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c8d","name":"Onam Festival Week","description":"The harvest festival of Kerala celebrated with flower carpets (Pookalam), grand feasts (Sadya), and traditional dance forms like Pulikali.","category":"Festival","district":"Statewide","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582234032338-34824874d6c7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"event","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c8e","name":"Kalaripayattu Night","description":"A showcase of Kerala's ancient martial arts, featuring gravity-defying moves and weapon demonstrations by experts.","category":"Cultural","district":"Wayanad","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582234032338-34824874d6c7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"event","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c8f","name":"Grand Kerala Food Fest","description":"Savor the spices! A massive food festival bringing together flavors from Malabar, Central Travancore, and the coast.","category":"Food","district":"Thiruvananthapuram","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555126634-323283e090fa?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"event","score":1},{"_id":"69907e5b262c4756c6ea0c91","name":"Spice Plantation Tour","description":"A hands-on workshop learning about spice cultivation, processing, and the medicinal uses of Kerala's famous black gold.","category":"Workshops","district":"Idukki","image":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1590510328503-903069695d38?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80","type":"event","score":1}]
